label: Idle
description: No tool call in flight; AI SDK stream running for content tokens

label: ReceivedRawArgs
description: Processor received value.input as raw LLM args; tool part created with status=running, state.input=raw

label: ParsingViaZod
description: Tool.define wrapper runs parameters.parse(args); z.preprocess transforms flat → canonical, string[] options → [{label,description}], missing header filled

label: Executing
description: Tool execute(parsed, ctx) runs; for QuestionTool, Question.ask is called with normalized questions array

label: PersistingNormalized
description: Processor tool-result handler: looks up ToolRegistry.get(toolName).parameters, safeParse(value.input), writes normalized to state.input with status=completed

label: PersistingError
description: Processor tool-error handler: writes state.input = value.input (raw) for debug evidence, status='error'
actions: Session.updatePart with state.input = value.input, state.error = errorMsg, status='error'

label: FormatValidationError
description: Wrapper catches ZodError; if tool has formatValidationError, wraps into human-readable message; otherwise uses generic fallback; execute never runs

label: RenderingDefensively
description: UI (QuestionDock / message-part / TUI session) imports Question.normalize and runs it on state.input before destructuring; old raw sessions and new normalized sessions both render correctly
actions: render questions tabs with q.header || q.question.slice(0,30)
